title: React - Chat UI with Streaming Response

files.src/App.css: :root{color-scheme:dark;}html,body{margin:0;height:100%;background:#09090b;}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;}.chat-shell{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;background:#09090b;color:#e5e7eb;}.chat-card{width:100%;max-width:720px;min-height:560px;background:#0f172a;border:1px solid #263244;border-radius:16px;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto;overflow:hidden;}.chat-header{padding:18px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid #263244;}.chat-header h1{margin:0;font-size:20px;font-weight:850;}.subtitle{margin:4px 0 0;color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;}.chat-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;overflow:auto;}.empty{margin:auto;color:#64748b;font-size:14px;}.message{display:grid;gap:4px;max-width:80%;}.message--user{align-self:flex-end;text-align:right;}.message--assistant{align-self:flex-start;}.message-role{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;}.message-bubble{border-radius:14px;padding:10px 12px;background:#172033;border:1px solid #263244;line-height:1.45;}.message--user .message-bubble{background:#a3e635;color:#111827;border-color:#a3e635;}.chat-input{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:14px;border-top:1px solid #263244;background:#0b1220;}.chat-input input{flex:1;min-width:0;border:1px solid #334155;background:#111827;color:#e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;}.chat-input button{border:0;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;background:#a3e635;color:#111827;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;}.chat-input button:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed;}.chat-input .ghost{background:transparent;color:#e5e7eb;border:1px solid #475569;}@media(max-width:640px){.chat-shell{padding:12px;}.chat-card{min-height:520px;}.chat-input{flex-wrap:wrap;}.chat-input input{flex-basis:100%;}.message{max-width:92%;}}
